title: Deawy's Fresh ore Blocks
description: This resource pack overhauls the ore blocks to make them stand out
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6351b415c1ced8d35c5269a1e392749d424ec3a.png)This resource pack overhauls the ore blocks to make them stand out.
This pack overhauls:
Diamond Block
Gold Block
Iron Block
Emerald Block
Lapis Block




![Emerald Block with Fresh Ore Blocks on.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c9ba5130b6ab6dc6c14af161a79fc127e1c0f12.png)
